technologyStack.styling: CSS variables with a blue and yellow Cooper Standard logo-aligned theme
technologyStack.visualizations: Custom SVG line, bar, heatmap, horizontal bar, and pie charts
technologyStack.excelExport: SheetJS .xlsx workbook generated in the browser

pages.description: Primary page for CAD automation usage visualization from the uploaded report.

graphs.title: Monthly Usage Runs
graphs.dataDisplayed: Total report events aggregated by month

graphs.title: Execution Breakdown
graphs.dataDisplayed: Total usage runs aggregated by month and segmented through report filters
features: Multi-application selection with application-driven functionality dropdown
Bar, line, and pie chart mode options
Download Data (.xlsx) scoped to selected applications, or all data when Applications is All

graphs.title: Application Usage Comparison
graphs.dataDisplayed: Monthwise usage comparison between two selected Cooper Standard tools

graphs.title: Monthly Usage Heatmap
features: Blue and yellow usage intensity palette

dataHandling.csvIngestionMethod: The app imports the uploaded CSV as a Vite asset, fetches it at runtime, detects the real header row after the report preamble, parses it client-side, normalizes MM/DD/YYYY dates, derives a YYYY-MM month bucket from StartDate, and treats each row as one usage event.
dataHandling.dataFlow: Uploaded CSV asset -> csvLoader header detection and normalization -> derived month buckets -> dataProcessor month filters and month aggregations -> dashboard page state -> SVG visualization components and Excel export.

stylingGuidelines.uiElementsStyle: Modern enterprise dashboard UI with a deep-blue sidebar, white logo panel, yellow primary action, subtle blue shadows, rounded but compact controls, and dense chart surfaces.

src.App.tsx: Root application component and route state

notes: The previous sample CSV has been removed from the app data path. The current application uses the uploaded 2026-05-12 report file.
